use_cases: Contact forms requiring multi-line text input with accessible labels
Comment sections or feedback forms with space-efficient labeling
User onboarding forms where inline labels improve visual hierarchy
Message input fields in chat or messaging interfaces
ai_summary: A multi-line textarea component featuring an animated floating label that rises to the top of the input when focused or containing content. Built on shadcn/ui's Textarea component with Tailwind CSS for styling. The label uses group-focus-within and CSS has() selectors for smooth transitions, creating a clean, modern form input experience ideal for space-constrained UIs.
